qa_pairs.question: What is re3data used for?
qa_pairs.answer: re3data is a resource for finding research data repositories.

qa_pairs.question: Where can one find an example of a sensitive data RDM toolkit?
qa_pairs.answer: An example of a sensitive data RDM toolkit is available at Memorial University ([https://guides.library.mun.ca/c.php?g=502039&p=5059458]).

qa_pairs.question: Is there a presentation available on sensitive data?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, ACENET provides a presentation on sensitive data ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u9rv9L4ZRpY]).

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find a bilingual glossary for Research Data Management (RDM)?
qa_pairs.answer: The Alliance offers a bilingual RDM Glossary ([https://alliancecan.ca/en/services/research-data-management/learning-and-training/glossaries]).

qa_pairs.question: Which organization provides Research Data Management Terminology?
qa_pairs.answer: Codata provides Research Data Management Terminology ([https://codata.org/initiatives/data-science-and-stewardship/rdm-terminology-wg/rdm-terminology/]).

qa_pairs.question: What resources are available for understanding sensitive data management?
qa_pairs.answer: For sensitive data, there is an example RDM toolkit from Memorial University ([https://guides.library.mun.ca/c.php?g=502039&p=5059458]) and a presentation on sensitive data by ACENET ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u9rv9L4ZRpY]).

qa_pairs.question: Are there any glossaries or terminology guides for Research Data Management?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the Alliance offers a Bilingual RDM Glossary ([https://alliancecan.ca/en/services/research-data-management/learning-and-training/glossaries]) and Codata provides Research Data Management Terminology ([https://codata.org/initiatives/data-science-and-stewardship/rdm-terminology-wg/rdm-terminology/]).
